title: Tech Disruptors: Lazard’s Bilicic on Power Demand in the AI Era
title_cn: 技术颠覆者：Lazard 关于人工智能时代电力需求的 Bilicic
summary: “The searches that you’re doing on Claude require the consumption of energy and at some point the system should hit a breaking point,” says George Bilicic, Lazard vice chairman of investment banking and global head of power, energy and infrastructure. Bilicic joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s Alexandra Davidov and Rob Barnett on this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast to discuss why AI and data-center demand are reshaping the outlook for utilities, power markets and infrastructure investment. title: South Korea Stock Boom: Why Kospi Is World’s Most Volatile Benchmark Stock Index
title_cn: 韩国股市繁荣：为何 Kospi 是全球波动性最大的基准股指
summary: Investing in South Korea’s stock market has yielded huge returns this year, but it’s been a wild ride. Volatility on the benchmark Kospi Index has topped 60%, almost double that of Japan’s Nikkei 225. It’s even put the notoriously skittish cryptocurrency Bitcoin in the shade.

Moonshot AI’s release of Kimi K3 on Friday triggered a similar reaction, helping push semiconductor stocks sharply lower.

summary: Moonshot AI has told investors it’s preparing to list in as early as six months, seizing the opportunity to tap capital markets after its latest model upended industry perceptions of China’s artificial intelligence capabilities and sent tech stocks reeling.
